title: AUDIENCE-ASK — Sara: 'Wanna see Daddy be the TAG-MONSTER?!'
prompt: Tight friendly close-up at @playground-park — soft green grass under foot, playground equipment softly visible BACKGROUND-OUT-OF-FOCUS. @Sara already CENTER-FRAME standing on the grass with both feet planted, ponytail with bow, big warm friend-to-friend grin, head turned DIRECTLY toward the camera with bright sparkle in her eyes. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both softly clasped together at her chest in a warm friendly 'come-here-to-me' kind gesture. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara holds her warm look at the camera, leaning gently toward camera with friend-to-friend conspiratorial sparkle. Sara (warm friend-to-friend voice, eyes shining at camera): "Hey kids! Wanna see Daddy be the TAG-MONSTER?!" She holds the friendly look at the camera waiting cheerfully for the kid watching at home to call out a guess. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara cups one hand softly around her mouth in a playful conspiratorial whisper-toward-camera gesture, eyes still on camera. Sara (cheerful warm whisper to camera, still beaming): "Daddy is SO silly when he plays tag! You'll see!" She gives a warm wink at the camera and beams. Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara stays grounded with both feet on the grass throughout — no leaping, no jumping. The grass stays plain green clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
